name: Black Forest Parfait
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces package Jell-O sugar-free instant chocolate pudding
1 can (6 packages) Red, pitted sour cherries, water-packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cream cheese with 1/4 cup skim milk on low speed of an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Add the remaining milk and pudding mix. Mix for 1-2 minutes or until smooth.
3. Mix cornstarch in cherry juice until dissolved. Cook over high heat until it boils for 1 minute, then remove from heat and stir in Equal sweetener.
4. Alternately spoon the pudding and cherries into parfait dishes, ending with pudding. Garnish with 2 cherries.
Nutrients per serving: Calories 116, fat 3.5g, cholesterol 14mg, carbohydrate 16g, sodium 304mg.
Exchanges: Bread 1/2, milk 1/2, fruit 1/2, fat 1.
